race.comment: WATTO'S MARK (2) was very impressive in this grade last time out, sitting handy and winning easily at Ascot. He'll need some luck from the barrier, though he possesses good early speed and may be able to offset the wide draw. His talent is no issue however and with a touch of luck, he can win again. STREAMLINED (12) was very impressive on debut before being thrown into the deep end in the Fairetha Stakes before a break. He'll be fitter for a recent trial coming into this and he showed enough in his debut to suggest he's up to this grade. Can storm over the top without surprising. COUNTRY GOD (1) was very impressive off a break in the Magic Millions 3YO and he should be better for that effort. May get back in the run from the draw, but ticks a few boxes and can be finishing strongly. HOLLER NUFF (8) improved nicely through the grades last campaign and is right up to this fresh. GOD'S CROSS (6) looks a nice horse on the rise and can't be left out of calculations.
